_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Prateek Wisteria
project.address: Plot No. GH-02B, Sector 77, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201301
project.description: A highly popular and mature ready-to-move-in residential development in Sector 77, Noida, spanning 15.36 acres with G+20 towers and premium security.
project.long_description: Prateek Wisteria in Sector 77, Noida is one of the most mature, celebrated, and beautifully established residential developments in Central Noida. Spanning a grand 15.36 acres of highly land-scaped layout, the society houses 1860 premium apartments across 20 majestic towers rising up to G+20 floors. Known for its high-caliber 3-tier security infrastructure (comprising smart-card access gates, active video intercoms, and comprehensive CCTV monitoring), the community has transitioned into a highly sought-after destination for corporate professionals. Designed with a massive 85% open space commitment, the towers are organized to encircle massive central lawns, walkways, and an extensive world-class clubhouse facility. The compound offers a completely self-sufficient ecosystem with on-site daily convenience stores, ATMs, banks, and a 24/7 medical store, providing residents with ultimate daily security and convenience.
marketing_claims: Extensive 15.36-acre land layout with 85% open spaces
Self-contained ecosystem with on-site convenience and medical stores
Completely ready-to-move-in with over 1500 resident families
Spectacular central clubhouse featuring sports and wellness zones
Walking distance to everyday retail and central markets

builder.name: Prateek Group
builder.company_overview: Prateek Group was founded in 2005 by visionary civil engineer Prashant Kumar Tiwari with a dedicated focus on building eco-friendly, structurally sound, and value-for-money residential landscapes. Over two decades, the developer has successfully completed several marquee developments in Noida, Ghaziabad, and Delhi NCR, including 'Prateek Laurel' and 'Prateek Edifice'. The group has won numerous accolades, including the 'Best Developer in Noida' award, and enjoys an outstanding reputation for building beautifully planned large-scale townships with robust community infrastructure.
awards: Best Developer in Noida — Times Realty Group

whats_included: High-grade flooring and premium sanitary installations

Fully modular high-end kitchen with quartz finishes

assumptions: All prices are based on current broker registers and secondary market resale averages as of Q3 2026.
GST is completely 0% for ready-to-move-in assets where Completion Certificate (CC) has been issued.
Circle rates and registration taxes follow UP state government guidelines.

payment_plan.notes: Registry process moves swiftly post bank mortgage verification and NOC clearances.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Prateek Wisteria is the leading integrated, high-security family community in Sector 77, Noida, celebrated for its 85% open botanical lawns and outstanding self-sufficient daily conveniences.
why_buy: Advanced Smart Security: Hosts a benchmark 3-tier security system with smart card gates and video intercoms.
Grand 15-Acre Layout: Features majestic towers encircling massive central botanical parks with 85% open area.
Self-Sufficient Ecosystem: On-site daily stores, banks/ATMs, and a 24/7 medical store eliminate daily errands.
why_avoid: Established Density: With 1,860 units across 20 towers, common sports zones are busy during weekends.
Slightly Premium Resale: Asking prices carry a modest premium reflecting the society's high demand.
decision_profile.best_for: Working corporate nuclear families, safety-focused buyers, and upgraders seeking mature premium societies.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Speculative flippers or buyers seeking isolated low-density villas.

buyerPersonas.headline: Unmatched Safety and Proximity to Work
reasons: 3-tier smart security ensures children play safely in central green courtyards.
Within 10-12 km of Sector 62/63 and Sector 125-142 IT corridors.

buyerPersonas.headline: Saves Time with On-Site Essentials
reasons: Dedicated in-house convenience store, laundry, ATM, and 24/7 medical store.

riskRadar.description: Completely physical handovers done. Zero construction risk.
Registries active, clean sub-lease deeds, zero litigation flags.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: Consistent high resale demand protects capital and commands a premium over the sector average.
investment_insights.rental_desc: Highly sought-after layout among mid-segment working families due to nearby schools.
investment_insights.market_desc: Consistent transactional volume in the secondary resale segment.
investment_insights.liquidity_desc: Easy exit options. Resale transactions complete rapidly due to the society's high reputation.

neighborhood_advantages.title: Highly Developed
neighborhood_advantages.description: Established central residential belt with complete social infrastructure.

persona_profile.risk_appetite: Conservative (requires immediate ready status with complete structural and title safety)
persona_profile.family_stage: Nuclear family with school-going children requiring premium sports facilities
persona_profile.work_location: Noida Sector 62 / 63, or Sector 125-142 IT corridors
persona_profile.motivation_note: Aims to upgrade their family's daily lifestyle, prioritizing superior children's security, on-site daily stores, and extensive central greens.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: Prateek Wisteria is one of the absolute finest ready-to-move-in family assets in Sector 77. Combining an impeccable 3-tier security system with a beautifully mature 15-acre self-sufficient landscape, it represents the gold standard of central family living.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: For residents, life is extremely convenient. On-site retail, banks, ATMs, and a 24/7 medical store eliminate daily chores, while kids can play safely in wide central parks.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: Commands high capital resilience and steady 5% rental yields due to Sector 77's maturity. Highly liquid resale asset.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Perfect for families. Dedicated children's play zones, swimming pools, and high-security smart-card entrances provide peace of mind.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Highly recommended for steady, hands-free rental returns from corporate professionals working in Noida's IT hubs.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Provides high premium standards including master bedroom wooden floorboards, grand lobbies, and majestic clubhouse spaces.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Lowest risk profile in the sector. Complete CC/OC clearances, active registrations, and a developer with zero historic construction litigation.
negotiation_leverage: Leverage minor cosmetic wear in older ready blocks to negotiate pricing discounts with motivated resale sellers.
Benchmark against older adjacent societies to ensure competitive per-sqft rates.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Ready to move immediately. Act swiftly if registered resale units are available near ₹11,000 per sqft.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Significantly larger 15-acre site layout with 85% open spaces; superior 3-tier security system and on-site daily convenience stores.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Closer walking distance to the Sector 76 metro station (5 mins walk vs 15 mins).
competitors.verdict: Express Zenith wins on pure metro walkway proximity; Prateek Wisteria wins on superior security, self-sufficient retail, and grander layout spaces.
competitors.price_delta_note: Prateek Wisteria is approx Rs 1,000/sqft cheaper than Express Zenith.
